summary: Added explicit M2 runtime save/load support inside the existing Save Envelope v1 DTO/codec boundary. M2 economy, population, agriculture, market, and route/transport runtime slices are now serialized when present, hydrated on load, and rejected with stable structured reasons when missing or malformed in an M2 runtime load. M1 golden/corrupt-save behavior remains compatible.

tests_run.result: Regression-first run failed as expected before implementation: M2 saved snapshot had undefined state.m2; missing-M2 load rejected only by meta.stateHash mismatch instead of stable state.m2 reason.

Modified writer files: packages/save-format/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, tests/save-load-contract.test.ts. Pre-existing lead/orchestration changes remained: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, and untracked project/tasks/active/M2-SAVE-RUNTIME-001.json.
Vitest passed: 2 files, 10 tests. Covers M1 golden/corrupt behavior plus M2 save/load contract tests.
Vitest passed: 9 files, 47 tests. Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for deterministic-rng-worker.ts remains.
Node/Worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
M1 3650-day baseline passed on node v24.13.1 win32 x64: throughput 15049 days/sec; p50 56800ns; p95 100700ns; p99 161400ns; saveByteLength 9980; save 1934300ns; load 1788300ns.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic canaries matched; root Vitest passed 19 files/91 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file/3 tests.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-SAVE-RUNTIME-001
tests_run.result: M2-SAVE-RUNTIME-001 shape ok: IN_PROGRESS R3 allowed=12 forbidden=17.
All matched files use Prettier code style.

decisions: Kept Save Envelope schemaVersion at v1 and extended the existing explicit WorldState v0 snapshot DTO with optional state.m2. M1 saves omit state.m2 and retain the existing golden shape.

Represented M2 runtime save data as explicit serializable DTOs in @monsoon/save-format without importing sim-core types or adding platform persistence, compression, database, IPC, IndexedDB, or production dependencies.
loadSaveV1 now requires state.m2 when the current runtime has M2 state, returning semantic-invariant at state.m2 before replacing runtime state.

Malformed and future-version M2 save data are rejected in save-format parsing with invalid-schema body.authoritativeSnapshot.state.m2 paths; cross-manifest data still rejects at header.contentManifestHash.
risks: R3 save-format/runtime contract change; systems_architect review is required before M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 relies on save/load hashes.

M2 runtime saves currently use the existing scenarioIdForRuntime fallback for non-M1 graph runtimes. This task did not add a new public scenario-id source because the acceptance target was explicit M2 runtime state preservation and rejection behavior.
The M2 malformed/future-version tests intentionally mutate encoded save JSON and recompute the v1 checksum to simulate valid-checksum imported saves.
requested_action: Review the R3 save/load DTO extension and M2 runtime rejection semantics. If accepted, route onward so M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 can compare save/load hashes without relying on implicit or omitted M2 state.
